projectDescription: A lightweight, open-source Python agent harness providing tool-use, skills, memory, permissions, and multi-agent coordination via the `oh` CLI.
keyFeatures: Streaming agent loop with tool-call cycle, retry, and parallel tool execution
43+ built-in tools covering file I/O, shell, web, search, MCP, and multi-agent coordination
On-demand skill loading from Markdown files, compatible with anthropics/skills
Plugin system compatible with claude-code plugins (commands, hooks, agents, MCP servers)
Multi-level permission modes with path-level rules and PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks
Persistent memory via MEMORY.md and session resume across conversations
Multi-agent coordination with subagent spawning and background task management
React/Ink terminal UI with interactive command picker and permission dialogs
Non-interactive print mode with text, JSON, and stream-JSON output formats
Support for Anthropic, Moonshot/Kimi, Vertex-compatible, and Bedrock-compatible providers
publicApiSurface: BaseTool — base class for custom tool implementations
ToolExecutionContext — context passed to tool execute() methods
ToolResult — return type for tool execute() methods
